description: Start the bot, see the welcome message, and configure your preferred fiat currency
Search for a token by symbol or contract address and add to watchlist
View your watchlist with inline buttons for price check, edit, and remove
Check the current price, 1h change, 24h change, and last update time for a token
Configure quiet hours to suppress alerts during specified time window
Configure your daily morning summary time and enable/disable
Show bot usage statistics including total users, active watch rules, top tracked tokens, and recent alerts (owner only)
